data.title: DevvStream Expands Portfolio with New Carbon Management Agreement
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

DevvStream ( (DEVS) ) has shared an update.

DevvStream has entered into a carbon management agreement with Energy Efficient Technologies (EET), an engineering firm known for reducing electricity use in commercial buildings. This partnership expands DevvStream’s portfolio to include building-efficiency assets and introduces new revenue streams from carbon credits and shared energy savings. The collaboration is expected to diversify DevvStream’s income and enhance its market positioning by tapping into the growing demand for energy-efficiency credits. EET’s proven track record with major clients like Marriott and McDonald’s supports the potential for significant environmental and financial benefits, positioning DevvStream to monetize large-scale energy savings effectively.

More about DevvStream

DevvStream is a leading carbon management firm founded in 2021, specializing in the development, investment, and sale of environmental assets. The company focuses on aligning sustainability with profitability, offering solutions across carbon markets and energy transition. It operates in three strategic domains: offset portfolio management, project investment and acquisitions, and project development, aiming to provide end-to-end solutions for organizations seeking to achieve climate initiatives and improve financial health.

Average Trading Volume: 17,894,814

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $11.25M

data.title: Kronos Bio Completes Merger with Concentra Biosciences
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Kronos Bio ( (KRON) ) has provided an update.

On June 20, 2025, Kronos Bio, Inc. completed a merger with Concentra Biosciences, LLC, through Concentra’s subsidiary, Merger Sub. The merger involved a tender offer where Kronos Bio’s outstanding shares were exchanged for cash and contingent value rights, with the merger resulting in Kronos becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of Concentra. Following the merger, Kronos Bio’s shares were delisted from Nasdaq, and the company filed to terminate its registration and reporting obligations with the SEC.

The most recent analyst rating on (KRON) stock is a Buy with a $2.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kronos Bio stock, see the KRON Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KRON Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KRON is a Neutral.

Kronos Bio’s overall stock score reflects its significant revenue growth but ongoing unprofitability and financial challenges. Corporate events provide a positive outlook with potential cost savings and shareholder value enhancement. Technical analysis suggests mixed market sentiment with some bearish indicators. The valuation remains speculative given the negative earnings and lack of dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on KRON stock, click here.

More about Kronos Bio

Kronos Bio, Inc. operates in the biotechnology industry, focusing on the development of novel cancer therapeutics. The company is engaged in discovering and developing therapies that target dysregulated transcription factors and other cancer drivers.

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Vuzix ( (VUZI) ) has shared an update.

On June 17, 2025, Vuzix Corporation held its annual stockholders meeting where several key decisions were made. The stockholders elected directors, ratified the appointment of Freed Maxick P.C. as the independent accounting firm for 2025, approved executive compensation, recommended annual advisory votes on executive compensation, and approved an amendment to increase authorized shares. Additionally, they approved the grant of restricted stock units to executives and employees, while canceling previously granted options.

The most recent analyst rating on (VUZI) stock is a Buy with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vuzix stock, see the VUZI Stock Forecast page.

Vuzix Corporation is a company operating in the technology industry, primarily focusing on the development and manufacturing of augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) wearable display devices. Sun Life Financial ( (TSE:SLF) ) has shared an update.

Sun Life Financial Inc. announced the conversion results of its Class A Non-cumulative Rate Reset Preferred Shares Series 8R and Class A Non-cumulative Floating Rate Preferred Shares Series 9QR. Following the conversion, Sun Life will have 8,880,847 Series 8R Shares and 2,319,153 Series 9QR Shares outstanding. The shares are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and may be redeemed by Sun Life under certain conditions. This conversion and redemption option provides flexibility in managing its capital structure, potentially impacting its financial strategy and shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SLF) stock is a Buy with a C$88.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sun Life Financial stock, see the TSE:SLF Stock Forecast page.

Cash flow challenges and a fair valuation keep the score moderated.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SLF stock, click here.

Sun Life is a leading international financial services organization offering asset management, wealth, insurance, and health solutions to individual and institutional clients. It operates in multiple markets globally, including Canada, the United States, and several countries in Asia and Europe, with total assets under management of $1.55 trillion as of March 31, 2025.
